name: stale-source freshness gate failure logs an entry to the merkle-chained audit log for compliance traceability
command: mkdir -p compliance .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch && printf '2026-04-01T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/freshness-status.sh" --source cfpb --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h --enforce --audit-log compliance/audit.log 2>err.txt; rc=$?; grep -q '"event":"pr-corpus-fresh-fail"' compliance/audit.log && grep -q '"source":"cfpb"' compliance/audit.log && echo logged 1>&2
